title: SE Ranking Keyword Research Result
description: Keyword data returned from SE Ranking keyword research endpoints including search volume, difficulty, CPC, and SERP features.

volume.description: Average monthly search volume for the keyword.

difficulty.description: Keyword difficulty score 0-100 estimating ranking competition.

cpc.description: Cost Per Click in USD for paid search ads targeting this keyword.

competition.description: Paid search competition level between 0 and 1.

intents.description: Search intent classifications for the keyword.

serp_features.description: SERP features present for this keyword such as featured snippets, local packs, image carousels.

trend.description: Monthly search volume trend data for the last 12 months.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the data region.

keyword_count.description: Number of words in the keyword phrase.
